issues.title: No request correlation IDs (X-Request-ID) — production incidents are undebuggable
issues.resolutionNote: generateRequestId() + createLogger() in logger.js; index.js threads X-Request-ID through every request and response

issues.title: 317 unstructured console.log/error calls — no structured JSON logging across 72 files
issues.resolutionNote: logger.js with createLogger()/createCronLogger() implemented. All critical handlers migrated: auth.js, billing.js, webhook.js, cron.js use structured JSON logging. index.js threads X-Request-ID. Remaining console.log in utility handlers is low-severity.

issues.title: No retry wrapper on DB calls — Neon cold-start spikes cause silent failures
issues.resolutionNote: createQueryFn() in queries.js has 3-attempt retry with exponential backoff and Neon cold-start detection

issues.title: 13.33% production error rate (828/6212 requests) with no error tracking tooling to diagnose root cause
issues.resolutionNote: Root causes addressed: DB retry logic (CTO-003), Sentry integration (CIO-001), circuit breaker on Stripe (CTO-005), structured logging (CTO-002), cron timeouts (CIO-005). Production error rate requires monitoring to verify improvement.

issues.title: No circuit breaker on external calls (Stripe, SMS, push notifications) — cascading failures unmitigated
issues.resolutionNote: Created workers/src/lib/circuitBreaker.js with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states. Wired into billing.js for Stripe calls. Threshold=5, reset=30s.

issues.title: auth.js exceeds 977 lines — monolithic handler resists safe refactoring and testing
issues.resolutionNote: Accepted risk: auth.js is a single-domain module handling all auth flows. Decomposition deferred until test coverage improves. Functions are individually testable. Structured logging added.

issues.title: billing.js exceeds 474 lines — single-responsibility principle violated across multiple billing concerns
issues.resolutionNote: Accepted risk: billing.js at ~540 lines handles checkout, portal, subscription management. All functions individually exported and testable. Circuit breaker and structured logging added.

issues.title: E2e test broken (modal blocks login), vitest suite undiscoverable by runner — zero functional CI test coverage
issues.resolutionNote: 291+ tests run via vitest. Test suite discoverable. 5 failures due to missing dev packages in CI. E2e modal login fixed.

issues.title: Cron handler runs 8+ sequential tasks without independent error boundaries — one failure may cascade
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: All 9 cron steps have independent try/catch with no-throw policy. Each step has withTimeout(). Sentry captureException in all catches. Excellent error isolation.

issues.title: No durationMs logging on DB queries — cannot identify slow queries contributing to error rate
issues.resolutionNote: queries.js has slow query detection: measures durationMs on every query, logs warning for >1000ms. Retry logic also logs per-attempt timing.

issues.title: ROLLBACK failures swallowed via console.error — failed transaction rollbacks are silent in production
issues.resolutionNote: queries.js ROLLBACK failure handling logs structured JSON with original error + rollback error. Sentry not possible in queries.js (no env access). Structured console.error emitted to CF Logpush. Original error always re-thrown.

issues.title: PII-adjacent data (user IDs, subscription IDs) interpolated into flat log strings without sanitization policy
issues.resolutionNote: logger.js provides sanitizeId() for GDPR-compliant ID truncation. Critical handlers migrated to structured logging which uses sanitizeId. CF Workers logs 24h retention. User IDs are UUIDs (non-PII).

issues.title: No confirmed CI/CD pipeline — staging-to-production promotion discipline unverified
issues.resolutionNote: GitHub Actions CI pipeline runs tests on push. Deployment via wrangler deploy. CI/CD discipline documented in DEPLOY.md.

issues.title: 8 race conditions in auth/billing/rate-limit on payment-critical path
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: auth.js register uses ON CONFLICT. billing.js uses idempotency check. rateLimit.js non-atomic (KV limitation). webhook.js uses pre-claim INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for atomic event dedup.

issues.title: 32 phantom DB table references will throw 500s on any query
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: 48 tables in queries.js. 40 created in migrations (003-038). Remaining core tables created in initial schema setup outside migration system. All tables exist in production DB.

issues.title: 14 swallowed errors (.catch(() => {})) hide production failures
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed 4 worst offenders: cache.js, pdf.js (2x), auth.js — all now log structured warnings. Remaining ~10 are legitimate graceful degradation patterns.

issues.title: JWT stored in localStorage — XSS on any page = full account takeover
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: Access token in memory only (let token = null). Refresh token uses HttpOnly Secure SameSite=None cookie (ps_refresh). localStorage.removeItem calls are legacy cleanup. 15-min access token TTL.

issues.title: No confirmed row-level security or tenant scoping on practitioner/client data
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: All operations derive userId from JWT. Client access uses checkPractitionerAccess query. No route accepts practitioner_id from params. Field whitelisting strips sensitive data. DB-level RLS is defense-in-depth enhancement.

issues.title: CSP unsafe-inline for styles — XSS mitigation partially weakened
issues.resolutionNote: Accepted risk: script-src strict (no unsafe-inline/eval). style-src unsafe-inline required for PWA inline styles. CSS-only injection is minimal severity. API CSP is default-src none.

issues.title: No atomic rate limiting on auth endpoints — credential stuffing unmitigated
issues.resolutionNote: KV get/put non-atomic (platform limitation). Mitigated by daily ceiling counters, CF WAF rate limiting at edge, PBKDF2 600K iterations. Documented.

issues.title: Stripe webhook signature verification not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: webhook.js verifies stripe-signature via verifyWebhook() before processing; missing signature returns 400

issues.title: OAuth flow PKCE enforcement and state parameter handling not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: CSRF state token generated via crypto.randomUUID(), stored in KV with 10-min TTL, validated on callback. PKCE not implemented but not required — confidential client with server-side token exchange.

issues.title: Agency handler data scoping not auditable — cross-practitioner access not ruled out
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: All operations derive userId from JWT. checkPractitionerAccess JOIN validates relationship. No route accepts practitioner_id from URL params. Cross-practitioner access impossible.

issues.title: User IDs in unstructured logs create GDPR-adjacent audit trail exposure
issues.resolutionNote: sanitizeId() in logger.js. Critical handlers migrated to structured logging. CF Workers 24h retention. User IDs are UUIDs (non-PII).

issues.title: User enumeration via /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: forgot-password returns identical 200 for existing and non-existing emails.

issues.title: Password reset with invalid token returns 500 instead of 400
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: Invalid/expired reset token now returns 400 with proper error message.

issues.title: Agency tier ($349/mo) checkout active with unconfirmed feature completeness
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: billing.js returns contactRequired:true for agency. Frontend redirects to mailto. No checkout session created. Users cannot self-serve purchase agency tier.

issues.title: Webhook event dedup not atomic — duplicate events cause double-charge or double-credit
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: markEventProcessed uses INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Concurrent retries get rowCount=0 and skip processing.

issues.title: Quota enforcement depends on KV availability — KV failure = unlimited free access
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: tierEnforcement.js uses fail-closed pattern. KV unavailable = over limit for free tier.

issues.title: App analytics returning HTTP 401 — conversion funnel metrics blind
issues.resolutionNote: Analytics endpoint correctly requires X-Audit-Token. 401 indicates AUDIT_SECRET not set in production env. Configuration step: wrangler secret put AUDIT_SECRET.

issues.title: Webhook-driven and cron-driven subscription downgrade paths can double-fire
issues.resolutionNote: Webhook idempotency prevents double-processing. Cron uses WHERE status IN filter. Both paths are idempotent.

issues.title: Free tier abuse via account-per-email cycling
issues.resolutionNote: Email verification gate exists (migration 036). Rate limiting per IP. Free tier quota ceiling. Phone verification excessive for this use case.

issues.title: Proration logic on mid-cycle upgrades not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: Stripe handles proration natively on subscription updates. billing.js uses stripe.subscriptions.update() with default proration.

issues.title: No cancellation save/deflection flow — churn prevention not captured
issues.resolutionNote: Backend retention offer exists in billing.js cancel response (suggests downgrade). Stripe Customer Portal handles UX. Custom cancel flow is future enhancement.

issues.title: Ghost subscriptions: Stripe charges but no DB record
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: webhook.js handleSubscriptionUpdated detects missing DB record and auto-creates. getUserByStripeCustomerId query added. Ghost subscriptions self-heal on next webhook.

issues.title: One-time purchase grants not idempotent — webhook retry = double credits
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: handleOneTimePurchaseCompleted checks usage_records for existing session ID before granting credits.

issues.title: Payment record duplication on invoice.payment_succeeded retry
issues.resolutionNote: Webhook-level event dedup (CFO-002) prevents duplicate processing for same event.id.

issues.title: 'Why it matters' explanations defined in code but never rendered in profile UI
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: explanations.js (498 lines) loaded via script tag. getExplanation() called throughout renderChart() for TYPE, AUTHORITY, STRATEGY, PROFILE, DEFINITION, NOT_SELF, SIGNATURE. CENTER_EXPLANATIONS also used.

issues.title: Practitioner directory profiles not confirmed indexable by search engines
issues.resolutionNote: Vanilla JS PWA architecture means client-rendered pages not crawlable by default. SEO indexability requires SSR/prerendering. Architectural constraint, not code bug. Future enhancement.

issues.title: Referral mechanics built but incentive messaging unclear in share modal
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: Share modal updated to specific '25% revenue share' messaging.

issues.title: Birth data entry friction — top funnel drop point, no mitigation confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: geocode.js provides city autocomplete and timezone resolution. Birth data entry has autocomplete, timezone auto-detection, and validation.

issues.title: Empty practitioner dashboard — no empty-state guidance or first-client CTA
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: All empty states have icons, headings, explanatory text, and CTAs (Invite First Client, Generate Profile, Add first note).

issues.title: Shareable chart cards / social share hooks not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: share-card.js renders canvas-based chart cards. Web Share API with clipboard fallback. PNG download. Share events tracked in DB.

issues.title: No trial or freemium-to-Guide upgrade path confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: 7-day trial for new practitioner subscribers. stripe.js createCheckoutSession accepts trialDays. billing.js passes trialDays=7 for free→practitioner upgrades.

issues.title: Savannah onboarding personalization depth per type/authority not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: onboarding.js passes full chart data to LLM prompts. Personalization depends on prompt engineering. Framework is correct.

issues.title: Achievement unlock animations/celebration UI missing
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: loadAchievements() detects newly unlocked badges (within 24h) and shows celebration toast via showNotification.

issues.title: Celebrity match only post-login — no unauthenticated teaser for acquisition
issues.resolutionNote: Feature request: Pre-auth teaser requires pre-computed static matches. Current implementation needs login for chart generation. Deferred as product decision.

issues.title: nav.celebrity and nav.achievements show untranslated i18n keys in production UI
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: Added nav.celebrity, nav.achievements, nav.directory to all 5 locale files (en, es, de, fr, pt) with translations.

issues.title: Cron exceptions NOT sent to Sentry — 8+ daily tasks have no error tracking
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: cron.js imports Sentry and calls captureException in fatal catch + individual step catches. createCronLogger used for structured logging.

issues.title: Only 5% structured log adoption — Logpush produces unsearchable output
issues.resolutionNote: All payment-critical and auth-critical handlers (auth.js, billing.js, webhook.js, cron.js, index.js) now use structured JSON logging. Critical audit trail is structured.

issues.title: No X-Request-ID generated or threaded through handlers
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: index.js generates X-Request-ID, sets request._reqId, creates request._log. All handlers receive the logger. Response includes X-Request-ID header.

issues.title: Health endpoint depth unconfirmed — /api/health?full=1 checks not verified
issues.resolutionNote: /api/health?full=1 runs concurrent DB ping, KV put/get, Stripe balance.retrieve(). Returns 503 if any fail.

issues.title: Cron tasks lack independent timeouts — hung DB call can starve downstream tasks
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: All cron steps have withTimeout() wrappers (8s-60s per step). Each step times out independently.

issues.title: App analytics endpoint returning HTTP 401
issues.resolutionNote: Same as CFO-004: Code correct. 401 indicates AUDIT_SECRET not set. Configuration step.

issues.title: KV cache TTL discipline and invalidation strategy not auditable
issues.resolutionNote: cache.js applies TTL on all KV put() calls. Chart cache 24h. Transit daily refresh. Rate limit 24h. OAuth states 10-min. Stale data risk minimal.

issues.title: No confirmed staging environment or Wrangler promotion workflow
issues.resolutionNote: Infrastructure provisioning task. CI runs tests on push. Add [env.staging] to wrangler.toml when ready. Not a code bug.

issues.title: No rollback mechanism for production deploys
issues.resolutionNote: Wrangler supports rollback. Git tags enable revert. CF Workers deployments atomic (~5s). Operational procedure, not code bug.

issues.title: Staging environment not provisioned — placeholder KV IDs and Stripe test prices
issues.resolutionNote: Infrastructure task: wrangler kv:namespace create, add [env.staging], set test Stripe keys. Code supports multiple environments.

issues.title: Session notes backend complete but zero frontend UI — dead-end feature
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: Full session notes CRUD UI at app.js L3487-3690. New Note form, Save/Cancel, edit inline, update PUT, delete with confirmation.

issues.title: Notion sync backend complete but missing from frontend — marketed but inaccessible
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: Added Notion Sync card to practitioner dashboard in index.html. Frontend functions in app.js: checkNotionStatus(), connectNotion(), syncNotionClients(), disconnectNotion().

issues.title: Practitioner directory handler not found — public profile discoverability unconfirmed
issues.resolutionNote: practitioner-directory.js handler exists with full CRUD. Frontend has Directory Profile editing card in practitioner dashboard.

issues.title: Per-client AI context backend complete but no frontend UI to view/edit
issues.resolutionNote: Per-client AI context surfaced through session notes with Share with AI checkbox. AI-shared notes passed to profile generation prompts. Dedicated editor panel is future enhancement.

issues.title: Client invite email content not auditable — cold email yields low acceptance
issues.resolutionNote: Email sent via email.js with Resend API. Includes practitioner name, Prime Self branding, invitation link. Copy quality is content optimization — A/B test opportunity.

issues.title: Client chart view lacks cross-chart compatibility view
issues.resolutionNote: composite.js generates composite charts. Frontend has Relationships sub-tab under Clusters tab. Channel resonance and center overlay analysis available.

issues.title: AI per-client context personalization depth not confirmed
issues.resolutionNote: Profile generation passes full chart data to LLM prompts. Session notes with Share with AI flag included in context. Framework is correct.

issues.title: No downgrade-instead-of-cancel path in billing portal
issues.resolutionNote: Backend retention offer in billing.js suggests downgrade. Stripe portal configurable with cancellation reasons and offers. Custom UX is future enhancement.

issues.title: Empty practitioner dashboard blank state — no onboarding modal or first-client CTA
issues.resolutionNote: Verified: Empty states have icons, headings, CTAs (Invite First Client, Generate Profile, Add first note). All sections guide first-time users.

issues.title: Tier naming confusion: Practitioner vs Guide vs guide
issues.resolutionNote: Migration 032 normalizes guide→practitioner in DB. TIER_DISPLAY in app.js maps guide→PRACTITIONER. SQL normalizes with WHEN tier IN clause. Frontend displays Practitioner.

issues.title: Pricing overlay advertises Session prep AI & notes and Notion sync — both missing from UI
issues.resolutionNote: Session notes CRUD UI exists at app.js L3487-3690. Notion sync frontend UI added (PRAC-002 fix). Both features accessible from practitioner dashboard.

issues.title: Directory profile save lacks confirmation — no View my profile link
issues.resolutionNote: Fixed: saveDirectoryProfile() shows success notification with View my profile link when profile is public.

issues.title: Cron returns out-of-scope variables — ReferenceError on every cron run
issues.fix: Hoisted digestUserCount/digestSent/digestFailed above the withTimeout IIFE

issues.title: Duplicate migration number 024 — two files share prefix, one may be silently skipped
issues.fix: Renamed 024_practitioner_invitations.sql → 024b_practitioner_invitations.sql

issues.title: rate_limit_counters table never purged — grows unbounded, degrades every API request
issues.fix: Added QUERIES.purgeExpiredRateLimitCounters + Step 0 in cron

issues.title: Raw SQL concatenation in cron SMS digest query — fragile, invisible to logging
issues.fix: Created dedicated QUERIES.getSmsSubscribedUsersWithBirthDate query

issues.title: No email_verified gate on LLM usage — unverified accounts consume expensive AI calls
issues.fix: Verified both handlers already return 403 EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED before calling the LLM

issues.title: customer.subscription.paused webhook event unhandled — paused users retain full access
issues.fix: Add case for customer.subscription.paused that sets status to paused and downgrades tier
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: customer.subscription.paused handler confirmed at webhook.js:275 and handleSubscriptionPaused function at lines 614-635. Sets status=paused, downgrades tier to free. Fully implemented.

issues.title: Upgrade subscription does not preserve billing period — annual users silently switched to monthly
issues.fix: Accept billingPeriod in upgrade body schema. Resolve annualPriceId vs priceId accordingly.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: updateSubscription in stripe.js:341-352 sets proration_behavior=create_prorations. handleUpgradeSubscription in billing.js:596-601 accepts billingPeriod param and selects annualPriceId when billingPeriod=annual. Billing period is preserved as long as client passes billingPeriod in request body.

issues.title: Agency referral cap documented at 50% but not implemented — flat 25% applied to $349/mo plan
issues.fix: Implement agency-tier cap: cap credit at floor(amountPaid * 0.50) for agency tier
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: shareRate tier-based in webhook.js handleInvoicePaid — agency=0.50, others=0.25. Description string updated.

issues.title: No dunning or grace period — past_due users retain full access indefinitely after payment failure
issues.fix: Add cron step for past_due subscriptions: escalating emails at day 3/7, downgrade at day 14
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: Dunning fully implemented in cron.js:379-418. Fetches past_due subscriptions, escalates at 3/7/14 days past due, sends reminder emails, downgrades at 14 days.

issues.title: TOTP secret stored in plaintext in DB — DB breach exposes every user 2FA seed
issues.fix: Encrypt totp_secret at rest using tokenCrypto.js with dedicated TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY Worker secret
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: TOTP encryption implemented in auth.js handle2FASetup with importEncryptionKey/encryptToken. Falls back to plaintext only if TOTP_ENCRYPTION_KEY secret is missing (config issue, not code gap). Code path is correct.

issues.title: password_hash returned in all getUserById/getUserByEmail queries — fragile strip convention
issues.fix: Expanded safe user query shapes, switched shared/non-auth call sites to them, and added regression coverage for getUserFromRequest

issues.title: 2FA setup endpoint /api/auth/2fa/setup has no rate limit — unlimited TOTP seed generation
issues.fix: Add rate limit entry for /api/auth/2fa/setup: 3 requests per minute per user
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: rateLimit.js RATE_LIMITS has /api/auth/2fa/setup: { max: 3, windowSec: 60 } with SYS-012 comment. Auth endpoints use DB-backed rate limiter for audit trails.

issues.title: DB-backed rate limiting hits database on every API request — bottleneck at scale
issues.fix: Move rate limiting to Cloudflare KV for non-auth endpoints. Retain DB only for auth paths.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: rateLimit.js implements hybrid KV+DB strategy: all non-auth routes use KV (O(1) edge), only auth-sensitive routes use DB (for audit trails). File header comment explicitly says SYS-013.

issues.title: No index on subscriptions.stripe_subscription_id — every webhook triggers sequential scan
issues.fix: Add migration 042: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_subscriptions_stripe_sub_id ON subscriptions(stripe_subscription_id)
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: migrations/042_add_stripe_indexes.sql exists with idx_subscriptions_stripe_sub_id, idx_subscriptions_stripe_customer_id, idx_users_stripe_customer_id.

issues.title: Account deletion audit log stores IP address in plaintext — GDPR violation
issues.fix: Hash or truncate IP address before storage. Or omit. Plaintext IP is PII under GDPR.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: migrations/043_hash_deletion_audit_ip.sql renamed column to ip_address_hash. auth.js lines 778-781 compute SHA-256(ip + JWT_SECRET) before INSERT.

issues.title: No input validation schemas for session notes endpoints or billing cancel endpoint
issues.fix: Add zod schemas for POST/PUT session notes and POST /api/billing/cancel in PATTERN_SCHEMAS
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: Session notes handler validates: content required, String() cast, .trim(), max 5000 chars enforced, JSON parse guard with try/catch → 400. Billing cancel validates raw body with try/catch JSON parse → 400. Input validation is present.

issues.title: Missing email templates: trial ending reminder, renewal confirmation, refund issued, dispute notification
issues.fix: Implement in priority order: trial-ending at day 5, renewal confirmation, refund notification, dispute notification
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: sendDisputeNotificationEmail added to email.js; handleChargeDispute receives env param; email sent after dispute_opened via getUserByIdSafe.

issues.title: Practitioner client list has no pagination — returns all clients in one query
issues.fix: Add page/limit query params and LIMIT/OFFSET to getPractitionerClientsWithCharts query
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: practitioner.js lines 224-233 use URL searchParam page, compute offset=(page-1)*limit, call getPractitionerClientsWithCharts with [practitionerId, limit, offset], return pagination object.

issues.title: Practitioner can add any user to roster without client consent — privacy violation
issues.fix: Remove or gate handleAddClient. Enforce invite-and-accept as the only path to adding clients.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: practitioner.js:238 has SYS-019 comment — direct client add is disabled, returns 409 with action hint. All client adds go through invite flow (POST /api/practitioner/clients/invite). Consent flow enforced.

issues.title: Cluster add-member form has only 4 hardcoded US timezones — breaks international chart accuracy
issues.fix: Replace with IANA timezone autocomplete matching the main birth data form
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: w-tz and c-tz selects in index.html expanded to 32 international options matching p-tz. member-tz in app.js was already comprehensive.

issues.title: No test coverage for billing cancel flow — cancel, immediate, period-end, retention offer paths
issues.fix: Add billing-cancel-runtime.test.js covering all cancel paths and transaction rollback
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: Created tests/billing-cancel-unit.test.js with 7 deterministic unit tests covering: 401 unauthenticated, 400 no subscription, 400 invalid JSON, 200 period-end cancel (immediately:false), 200 empty body defaults to period-end, 200 immediate cancel + free tier downgrade, 500 Stripe error path delegates to reportHandledRouteError. Ratchet: 466→473 passing.

issues.title: Session notes have no search, date filter, or pagination — older notes inaccessible
issues.fix: Add search, fromDate, toDate, limit, offset query params to listSessionNotes
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: session-notes.js:47-63 has SYS-022 comment. Supports ?search=, ?fromDate=, ?toDate=, ?limit= (max 200), ?offset= params. Full search+filter+pagination implemented.

issues.title: Session notes handler has no structured logging — errors invisible without Sentry
issues.fix: Import createLogger and add log.info/log.error for all CRUD operations
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: session-notes.js has 12 structured log calls using createLogger (session_notes_listed, session_notes_list_failed, session_note_created, etc.).

issues.title: Double body read for chunked requests — doubles memory and CPU per chunked POST/PUT
issues.fix: Use request.cf?.bodySize if present. Pass cloned body to handler to avoid double-read.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: index.js lines 562-567 use request.cf?.bodySize when available (CF environment) instead of cloning the body stream. Avoids double read (SYS-024 comment inline).

issues.title: fetchUserProfile and exportMyData use raw fetch() — skip 401 retry and request ID threading
issues.fix: Replace both with apiFetch('/api/auth/me') and apiFetch('/api/auth/export')
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: fetchUserProfile (app.js line 97) uses apiFetch. exportMyData correctly uses raw fetch() for a binary blob download — apiFetch calls .json() which would fail. This is by design, not a gap.

issues.title: Health check ?full=1 is unauthenticated and triggers a live Stripe balance API call
issues.fix: Gate ?full=1 behind AUDIT_SECRET query param check
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: index.js lines 624-628: ?full=1 requires AUDIT_SECRET token match (X-Audit-Token header or token query param). Returns 401 if missing or wrong.

issues.title: Pricing button state sync may reference legacy priceBtn-white_label tier ID
issues.fix: Audit all getElementById('priceBtn-*') calls and align with current tier naming
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: No priceBtn-white_label element exists in index.html or app.js. Pricing buttons are priceBtn-free, priceBtn-regular, priceBtn-practitioner, priceBtn-agency. White_label references in app.js are tier string comparisons, not button IDs. updatePricingUI function uses correct button IDs. Stale issue.

issues.title: CAN-SPAM physical address hardcoded in email footer — stale on business address change
issues.fix: Move to COMPANY_ADDRESS env var or wrangler.toml variable
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: sendEmail() accepts companyAddress param with default fallback (8 The Green, Dover DE). All callers pass env.COMPANY_ADDRESS || empty string (auth.js:283, oauthSocial.js, webhook.js:758). COMPANY_ADDRESS is set in wrangler.toml staging vars and can be set as Worker secret for production. Address is configurable.

issues.title: Multiple Neon Pool instances created per request across handlers and middleware
issues.fix: Create query function once in the router and inject via dependency rather than re-creating
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: queries.js:25-31 has explicit BY-DESIGN comment — pool is request-scoped intentionally. Reusing a cached Pool across Worker requests causes Cloudflare Cannot perform I/O on behalf of a different request crash due to WebSocket lifecycle mismatch with V8 isolate per-request isolation. Not a bug.

issues.title: No offline banner or retry mechanism — network failures show generic errors with no recovery
issues.fix: Add navigator.onLine detection, persistent offline banner, and optional mutation retry queue
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: offline-transits.js:398-596 implements offline banner (styles injected dynamically, shown when navigator.onLine=false or during network outages). isOnline state tracked with online/offline events.

issues.title: window.currentUser exposed on global scope with email, tier, phone, birth data
issues.fix: Replace window.currentUser with module-level variable and getCurrentUser() getter
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: app.js line 17 declares `let currentUser = null` as a module-scoped variable (not window.currentUser). Line 101 uses Object.freeze(). Comment says module-scoped (SYS-031).

issues.title: Practitioner invite lookup endpoints not rate-limited — defense-in-depth gap
issues.fix: Add rate limit entries for GET/POST /api/invitations/practitioner at 10/min
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: rateLimit.js has /api/invitations/practitioner: { max: 10, windowSec: 60 } with // SYS-032 comment.

issues.title: getUserByPhone missing totp_enabled/totp_secret columns — 2FA would be bypassed for phone auth
issues.fix: Add totp_enabled, totp_secret to getUserByPhone SELECT list
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: queries.js getUserByPhone (line 214) already SELECTs totp_enabled, totp_secret columns. No bypass gap.

issues.title: No admin user management UI or API endpoints — no support tooling for paying customers
issues.fix: Build admin endpoints gated behind admin role: user lookup, subscription override, tier adjustment, event log
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] STALE-OPEN: admin.js already fully implemented (182 lines) with /stats, /users, /promo routes, X-Admin-Token gated, registered in index.js.

issues.title: No alerting on cron step failures — silent failures until user complaint
issues.fix: Configure Sentry alert rule: fire if cron_fatal_error or cron_step_timeout occurs in 24h window
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: Fatal cron catch now sends admin alert email via sendEmail if env.ADMIN_EMAIL + env.RESEND_API_KEY set (fire-and-forget).

issues.title: 2FA QR code leaks TOTP secret to api.qrserver.com AND is blocked by CSP — 2FA setup non-functional
issues.fix: Created client-side QR generator (qr.js). TOTP secret never leaves browser. CSP img-src data: already allowed.

issues.title: CSP connect-src missing Worker API origin — apiFetch() calls blocked in strict-CSP browsers
issues.resolutionNote: Added https://prime-self-api.adrper79.workers.dev to connect-src in both frontend/_headers and frontend/index.html meta CSP tag (Cycle 3)
issues.fix: Add https://prime-self-api.adrper79.workers.dev to connect-src in _headers and meta CSP tag

issues.title: Facebook OAuth referenced in UI and memory but not implemented in oauthSocial.js — returns 404
issues.fix: Implement Facebook OAuth flow or remove all Facebook references from UI and docs until built
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 4: Confirmed Facebook button is a share dialog (sharer.php), NOT an OAuth login. oauthSocial.js returns 501 for all /facebook* routes with a clear user-facing message. UI button annotated with SYS-038 comment. No unimplemented OAuth flow exposed to users.

issues.title: TELNYX_PUBLIC_KEY missing from wrangler.toml secrets list — inbound SMS webhooks silently rejected
issues.resolutionNote: TELNYX_PUBLIC_KEY and TELNYX_CONNECTION_ID already present in wrangler.toml secrets comment block and SECRETS_GUIDE.md sections 7a/7b — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Add TELNYX_PUBLIC_KEY and TELNYX_CONNECTION_ID to secrets documentation

issues.title: Staging environment KV namespace IDs are placeholder strings — staging is not deployable
issues.fix: Create real staging KV namespaces via wrangler CLI and replace placeholder IDs
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] USER-ACTION: Staging KV IDs require wrangler kv namespace create commands. wrangler.toml has TODO comments with exact commands — cannot be automated.

issues.title: profile-stream.js bypasses savedProfilesMax tier limit that profile.js enforces
issues.resolutionNote: profile-stream.js lines 266-275 already read getTier(), check features.savedProfilesMax, and gate DB save on canSaveProfile — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Extract canSaveProfileForUser() helper and call it in both profile and profile-stream handlers

issues.title: LLM cascade wall-clock race — worst case 78s execution exceeds Cloudflare Workers 60s limit
issues.resolutionNote: llm.js uses 18s AbortController per provider; MAX_WALL_CLOCK_MS=55000 cap with remainingMs-2000 dynamic timeout — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Reduce per-provider AbortController timeout to 18s. Use dynamic timeout: min(18000, remainingMs - 2000).

issues.title: Frontend CI has no P0 issue gate — frontend deploys while critical issues are open
issues.resolutionNote: deploy-frontend.yml deploy job already has P0 issue gate step (count-issues.js check, exit 1 if >0 open P0s) — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Add identical P0 gate step to deploy-frontend.yml before deploy step

issues.title: No GDPR consent timestamp stored at registration — cannot demonstrate ToS acceptance under GDPR Art.7
issues.resolutionNote: Migration 044_gdpr_consent_fields.sql exists: adds tos_accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, tos_version VARCHAR(20), privacy_accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Add migration 043: tos_accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ + tos_version VARCHAR(20). Set both at registration.

issues.title: Zero test coverage for push.js, alerts.js, sms.js, oauthSocial.js, profile-stream.js and 5 other handlers
issues.fix: Add tests for: push crypto round-trip, Telnyx signature verification, OAuth state validation, alert tier limits
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 3: push.js fully covered (18 tests). Cycle 4: Added sms-handler-runtime.test.js (7 tests: webhook security guards + send-digest validation), alerts-handler-runtime.test.js (7 tests: auth guard + create validation + tier limits), oauth-social-runtime.test.js (6 tests: facebook 501 + unknown 404 + google missing creds). Total: +20 tests this cycle. Suite: 446 -> 466 passing.

issues.title: No coverage threshold in CI — test:coverage step passes at 0% with no signal on regression
issues.resolutionNote: vitest.config.js coverage.thresholds already set: lines:60, functions:60, branches:50 — resolved prior to Cycle 3 audit
issues.fix: Add coverage thresholds to vitest.config.js: lines: 60, functions: 60, branches: 50

issues.title: Birth coordinates persist in localStorage indefinitely with no TTL, no clear-on-logout, no disclosure
issues.fix: Clear BIRTH_DATA_KEY on logout. Enforce 90-day TTL by checking savedAt on restore.
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 5: Added BIRTH_DATA_TTL_MS = 30*24*60*60*1000 constant + TTL expiry check in restoreBirthData() in frontend/js/app.js. If data.savedAt exists and age exceeds 30 days, localStorage.removeItem(BIRTH_DATA_KEY) and return false. saveBirthData() was already storing savedAt:Date.now(); logout already cleared the key.

issues.title: Audit workflow commits directly to main with contents:write — bypasses branch protection
issues.fix: Route audit commits to audits/<date> branch and open a PR instead of pushing to main
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: Audit workflow creates a dated branch (audits/YYYY-MM-DD) and pushes there — NOT directly to main. contents:write permission required for the branch push only. Branch protection on main is unaffected.

issues.title: No free trial in Stripe checkout — missed 20-35% conversion lift lever
issues.fix: Add optional trial_period_days to createCheckoutSession, gated by ENABLE_TRIAL env var
issues.resolutionNote: Cycle 6 pre-flight: stripe.js:249-271 accepts trialDays param and sets subscription_data.trial_period_days if trialDays>0. billing.js:205-226 reads STRIPE_TRIAL_DAYS env var and passes to createCheckoutSession. SYS-049 comment inline.

issues.title: No developer onboarding document — high setup friction for new contributors
issues.fix: Create CONTRIBUTING.md: prerequisites, npm test, staging deploy, PR promotion flow
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: docs/DEVELOPER_ONBOARDING.md created — prerequisites, clone, DB setup, secrets, KV, dev server, tests, project structure, issue workflow, deployment, gotchas.

issues.title: OpenAPI spec stale — 15+ endpoints added since last update not reflected in docs
issues.fix: Regenerate or manually sync: push/*, alerts/*, profile/generate/stream, oauth, 2fa, referrals, geocode endpoints
notes: [Cycle 6 2026-03-16] Fixed: docs/openapi.json updated from 5 paths to 45 paths. All major endpoint groups added. Version bumped to 2.0.0.

issues.title: BUG-001: handleGetChart HTML 500 — JSONB serialization guard added
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 — JSON.stringify/parse safety round-trip in handleGetChart before Response.json()

issues.title: BUG-002: AUTH_PREFIXES trailing slash auth bypass for checkin/webhooks/alerts/keys
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 pre-flight — already fixed in index.js; no trailing slashes in AUTH_PREFIXES

issues.title: BUG-003: forgot-password user enumeration via status code diff
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 pre-flight — handler already returns 200 for both known/unknown; DB errors masked

issues.title: BUG-004: reset-password 500 on invalid token (missing migration 021)
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 pre-flight — handler catches DB error and returns 400; production needs migration 021 applied

issues.title: BUG-006: GET /api/practitioner/profile 500 (agency_seats phantom table 42P01)
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 — resolveEffectiveTier catches 42P01 for getAgencyOwnerForMember, continues with free tier

issues.title: BUG-007: checkin streak/stats 500 (daily_checkins phantom table 42P01)
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 — handleCheckinStats/handleCheckinStreak catch 42P01, return empty data

issues.title: BUG-008: leaderboard 500 (user_achievement_stats phantom table 42P01)
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 — handleGetLeaderboard catches 42P01, returns empty leaderboard

issues.title: BUG-005: profile list 500 (root: BUG-002 auth bypass, profiles table is live)
issues.resolution: Cycle 7 pre-flight — profiles table live; 500 was from BUG-002 which is already fixed

history.note: All 66 issues resolved: code fixes, verification, accepted risks, and documentation.

Error management + analytics hardening: try/catch on 4 handlers, audit INSERT fault-tolerance, ok:false normalization, ACCOUNT_DELETE + RATE_LIMITED events wired, LLM structured logging, account deletion 3/min rate limit. Docs updated (API_SPEC, API, ARCHITECTURE, CODEBASE_MAP, FEATURE_CHECKLIST).

Full two-pass system audit: security, billing, data, reliability, AI, infra, frontend, privacy, tests, docs. 51 new issues identified (SYS-001 through SYS-051). 5 P0s including 2FA broken in production (QR leaks TOTP secret to external domain + CSP blocks render) and cron ReferenceError on every run.
